training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: preserves official target-gene order/count from the source-backed K562 DEG task contract; model validates target count and predicts all aligned targets

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN perturbation embedding features inherited from parent
pipeline_program.target_side: official target gene order with learned per-target low-rank factors
pipeline_program.head: target_gene_aware_low_rank_bilinear_head
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned official target-gene-aware head over the 6,640 DEG targets; no external/static wrapper or fallback
